Who We Are

Bangalore’s
KWIN City Specialists.

Kanopy Ventures LLP is a real estate sales, marketing, and advisory firm built for the Nelamangala–Doddaballapur corridor. Incorporated August 2024, precisely when this corridor became Bangalore’s most watched land market.

We do not list plots we have not walked. Every mandate goes through: physical verification, 30-year title search, BMRDA clearance, and independent legal review.

Active mandates include RY Realty, Bandi Developers, and Congruent Developers — pre-launch inventory not on any portal.

NelamangalaDoddaballapurDabaspetDevanahalliBudigere CrossHennur Road
What We Do

Beyond the Transaction.
We Stay With You.

Most agents hand you a file and disappear. Kanopy Ventures walks the entire journey — from choosing your land to selling for maximum return.

01

Find & Buy the Right Property

BMRDA approved plots most buyers never see. Every listing carries a 30-year title search. You see only what is clean, clear, and ready.

02

Build Your Holiday Home

Once you own the land, we help you build. Trusted architects and builders design homes suited to KWIN City’s emerging lifestyle — weekend retreats that generate rental income.

03

Manage & Generate Returns

Rentals, maintenance, income collection, monthly reports — all handled by Kanopy Ventures while you earn from anywhere in the world.

04

Sell at the Right Time

When the corridor matures and values peak, we advise on your exit, market to our buyer network, and manage the complete sale end to end.

KWIN City Districts

5,800 Acres. Four Districts.
One Extraordinary Opportunity.

Launched September 26, 2024. Backed by Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw and Dr. Devi Shetty.

District 01 · 177.1 Acres
Knowledge District
Top 500 foreign universities invited. IISc, NIMHANS and Manipal in discussions. Global education hub.
District 02 · 134.9 Acres
Healthcare District
Asia’s premier academic medical hub. Life Sciences Park. World-class hospitals and research.
District 03 · 116.7 Acres
Innovation District
Aerospace, semiconductors, EV technology, advanced manufacturing R&D.
District 04 · 103.7 Acres
Residential District
500,000 residents. 40% green cover. Monorail. Interconnected lakes. This is where your land sits.

45 Minutes from the Airport.
Connected to Everything.

STRR · NH-48 · NH-648 · Bengaluru–Pune Greenfield Expressway · Proposed Metro Extension

Why This Matters

The Facts Every
Serious Investor Needs.

Officially launched September 26, 2024 by CM Siddaramaiah — the largest single greenfield urban investment in Karnataka’s history at ₹40,000 crore.

Backed by Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw (Biocon) and Dr. Devi Shetty (Narayana Health) — two of India’s most credible private sector names.

On the Satellite Town Ring Road (STRR), 45 minutes from Kempegowda International Airport, 5 km from the Bengaluru–Pune Greenfield Expressway.

Designed for 500,000 residents with 40% green cover, central monorail, interconnected lakes, and a 465-acre solar farm covering all energy needs.

International universities in discussion — St. John’s University (New York) and University of York (UK), alongside IISc, NIMHANS and Manipal.

Phase 1 infrastructure for the first 500 acres now active. Plug-and-play ready for universities, hospitals and R&D hubs. The ground-floor moment is now.

Why Land Here Holds Value

A City Built to
Last 50 Years.

KWIN City is a government-planned smart city with a 465-acre solar farm, 50% rainwater harvesting, and 40% dedicated green space. Infrastructure built to last.

This is the city fabric that sustains and grows real estate values for decades. Land near KWIN City is not a speculative bet — it is a position in Bangalore’s long-term future.

Why Kanopy Ventures

Five Commitments.
No Exceptions.

The minimum standard we hold ourselves to on every mandate, every client, every time.

01

Only BMRDA Approved Plots

We never list a plot without BMRDA approval. The certificate is shown before any price conversation. No “in process” answers, ever.

02

30-Year Title Search

Every plot traced 30 years back — every owner, transaction, encumbrance, court record. Documented by our named legal team.

03

Your Lawyer Verifies Everything

We actively encourage your own independent lawyer. Complete legal package provided at no charge, no time pressure.

04

Complete Document Handover

After every transaction: Sale Deed, Encumbrance Certificate, BMRDA layout plan, Property Tax receipt, and boundary demarcation on site.

05

Full Lifecycle Accountability

We are not transactional brokers. Our relationship begins at purchase and continues through construction, management, and sale. When something needs attention three years later — we are still here, still accountable.

The Full Journey

Buy. Build. Manage.
Sell When the Time is Right.

Most people buy land and wait. We help you activate your land — turn it into a holiday home, generate rental income, and exit at the peak when KWIN City matures.
01
Step One

Choose Your Land

BMRDA approved gated community plots in the KWIN City corridor. Walked, legally cleared, verified before we recommend.

02
Step Two

Build Your Holiday Home

Trusted architects design homes for KWIN City’s emerging lifestyle — weekend retreats that also generate short-term rental income.

03
Step Three

We Manage. You Earn.

Kanopy Ventures manages your property completely — rentals, maintenance, income collection, monthly reports from anywhere in the world.

04
Step Four

Sell at the Peak

When values peak, we advise on your exit and manage the complete sale for maximum return.

05
The Result

Land That Works For You

The Kanopy Ventures model turns your KWIN City plot into an active asset — generating income while you hold, superior returns when you exit.

KV
Our Promise

One Point of Contact. Always.

From first call to final sale — one dedicated advisor. No handoffs, no junior teams. Real people who know your property as well as you do.

For NRI Investors

Own Property Near India’s
Most Exciting City.
From Anywhere.

KWIN City is the first greenfield smart city in India that makes genuine sense for NRI land investment — government-backed, globally connected, 45 minutes from the airport your family already uses.

🇺🇸 USA🇬🇧 UK🇨🇦 Canada🇸🇬 Singapore🇦🇪 UAE🇦🇺 Australia🇩🇪 Germany🇳🇱 Netherlands

FEMA Compliant

Full guidance on NRE/NRO transfers. No ambiguity, no shortcuts.

Power of Attorney

POA arranged — you never need to be present in Bangalore.

Virtual Site Tours

HD video walkthrough before you commit a single rupee.

Rental Income

Monthly income reports and direct transfers to your account.

01

Discovery Call & Plot Selection

Dedicated advisor walks you through inventory via video call. All legal documents shared digitally.

02

Virtual Site Tour

HD walkthrough of your shortlisted plot and surrounding infrastructure.

03

Legal Review & FEMA Guidance

Full title package for your lawyer. FEMA-compliant payment routing arranged.

04

POA & Remote Registration

Power of Attorney arranged. Registration completed in Bangalore. You stay wherever you are.

05

Documents Couriered to You

Original Sale Deed and complete ownership set to your international address.

06

Ongoing Management & Returns

Kanopy Ventures manages, generates income, and advises on the optimal exit.

The Team

Three Founders.
One Corridor.

Kanopy Ventures LLP was incorporated in August 2024 by three founders who identified the KWIN City corridor before most of Bangalore knew it existed.

Kauser Ahmedd, Founder and Managing Partner, brings deep operational real estate experience and an investor-first philosophy built on full transparency.

Vijeth Kumar Ponguru Reddy, Partner, is a serial entrepreneur whose business development instinct makes Kanopy Ventures one of the best-connected firms in North Bangalore.

Active mandates include RY Realty (14N project), Bandi Developers (launching late 2026), and Congruent Developers.
